## Pre-review checklist

<!-- Please tick all that apply before requesting a review. -->

- [ ] Code compiles and runs without errors (`./gradlew assembleDebug` passes)
- [ ] Tested on an emulator or physical device
- [ ] No hardcoded strings, colours, or dimensions (use theme/resource values)
- [ ] New code follows the existing MVVM + Clean Architecture layer separation
- [ ] Existing unit/instrumented tests still pass (`./gradlew test`)
- [ ] New logic is covered by at least one unit test (if applicable)
- [ ] No unnecessary files or debug logs included in the diff
